<!-- source-hash: 688fdfb8c4e883c910bde3821d4a3a42 -->
A specialized exception thrown when a requested organization cannot be located in the system.

## Key Components

| Component | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `OrganizationNotFoundException` | Extends `NotFoundException` with organization-specific context |
| `ErrorCode.ORGANIZATION_NOT_FOUND` | Standardized error code from the core exception framework |

## Usage Example

```java
public Organization getOrganization(String organizationId) {
    return organizationRepository.findById(organizationId)
        .orElseThrow(() -> new OrganizationNotFoundException(organizationId));
}
```

The exception automatically formats the error message as `"Organization not found: {organizationId}"` and binds the `ORGANIZATION_NOT_FOUND` error code for consistent API error responses.
